headline: Why
description: Because your business deserves infrastructure that works for you — not a subscription that works against you.

stats.label: Ownership
stats.description: You own every line of code. No licensing, no lock-in, no permission required.

stats.label: Direct Access
stats.description: Work directly with the engineer building your software. No account managers, no middlemen.

stats.label: Not Months
stats.description: We ship production-ready software fast — without cutting corners on quality.

stats.label: Per Seat
stats.description: No recurring SaaS fees. No per-user pricing. Pay once, own forever.
